# Support

Before opening an issue, please check the following resources first:

- **Documentation**: see the [README](../README.md) for setup and usage examples.
- **Existing issues**: search [open and closed issues](https://github.com/worddevs/kira-arts/issues?q=is%3Aissue) to see if your question has already been answered.

## Getting help

- **Bug reports**: use the [bug report template](https://github.com/worddevs/kira-arts/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml).
- **Feature requests**: use the [feature request template](https://github.com/worddevs/kira-arts/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml).
- **General questions**: use [Discussions](https://github.com/worddevs/kira-arts/discussions) instead of opening an issue.

## Reporting a security issue

Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities. Instead, contact the maintainers directly.
